rulings.Calendar Matter: Claimant'S Hearing For Disbursement Of Surplus Funds
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 14, 2016, line 1. Claimant'S Hearing For Disbursement Of Surplus Funds OFF CALENDAR, the surplus funds have not yet been deposited with the Court. The hearing will be re-set after the deposit is made. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FRANCES SUSSNA VS. PRIME OLD COUNTY LP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Notice Of Settlement And Maintain Case On Active Civil Status
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 14, 2016, line 2. PLAINTIFF FRANCES SUSSNA's Motion To Set Aside Notice Of Settlement And Maintain Case On Active Civil Status GRANTED as follows (1) the case will be referred to case management and (2) the case shall not be set for trial until August 1, 2016. Unauthorized "sur-opposition" is stricken. Hearing Required to address whether $250,000 shall be returned to Defendants or posted with the Court. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HECTOR MORONES ET AL VS. YOUNG NA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Claims For Punitive Damages And Attorneys Fees In Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 14, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT YOUNG NA's Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Claims For Punitive Damages And Attorneys Fees In Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint DENIED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HECTOR MORONES ET AL VS. YOUNG NA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 14, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT YOUNG NA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to support each element of each cause of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES ALAN TOLBERT TRUSTEE OF THE FRANCES M CLEARY VS. PATRICIA TOLBERT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 14, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT PATRICIA TOLBERT's Motion For Judgment DENIED. Moving party failed to show that Plaintiff breached the Settlement agreement. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MUSA DIRBAS VS. MARY KENT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories And Special Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 14, 2016, line 5. PLAINTIFF MUSA DIRBAS' Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories And Special Interrogatories GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections to Special and Form Interrogatories within 5 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 16TH/TAYLOR APTS LLC VS. RAFAEL COFFEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: (Second Amended) Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records And For A Protective
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 14, 2016, line 6. DEFENDANT RAPHAEL COFFEY's (Second Amended) Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records And For A Protective continued to February 4, 2016. Plaintiff to file a declaration showing that Certificate of Revivor was issued/not issued no later than February 3, 2016. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LACEY LAVIGNA VS. RUSSELL GONZALES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 14, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANTS RUSSELL GONZALES, RICHARD COMITO and MARC KUCHARSKI's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint DENIED, 5 days to respond. See Borsuk v. Appellate Division (2015) 242 Cal.App.4th 607. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AVA NINTH, L.P., VS. RASHAD SMITH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 14, 2016, line 8. DEFENDANT RASHAD SMITH and MAXINE RAMOS-SMITH's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Notice is sufficient per CCP 1161(2). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES VANYA VS. ANGEL MARTINEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 14, 2016, line 9. DEFENDANT ZOILA MARTINEZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. ALESSANDRO MANAHAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 14, 2016, line 10. DEFENDANT ALESSANDRO MANAHAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Nuisance is sufficiently stated. = (501/REQ)
